info.title: Power Platform ALM
info.description: Dual-mode connector for Power Platform Application Lifecycle Management. Manages solutions (list, export, import, publish, delete, version) and deployment pipelines (list, deploy, monitor) across environments. MCP endpoint for Copilot Studio agents plus typed operations with full schemas for Power Automate.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration. Provides solution management and deployment pipeline tools for Power Platform ALM.

get.description: List all solutions in a Power Platform environment. Returns solution unique name, display name, version, managed status, publisher, and timestamps.

modifiedOn.description: Date the solution was last modified

get.description: Get details of a specific solution by unique name including version, components, and publisher information.

post.description: Export a solution from an environment as a managed or unmanaged zip file. Returns the solution as a base64-encoded zip.

solutionName.description: The solution unique name to export

fileSizeBytes.description: Size of the exported file in bytes

post.description: Import a solution zip file into a target environment. Accepts base64-encoded solution zip. The import runs asynchronously.

publishWorkflows.description: Whether to publish workflows after import

holdingSolution.description: Import as holding solution staged for upgrade

post.description: Publish all customizations in an environment. This makes all unpublished changes live.
Delete a solution from an environment. This removes the solution but not the components it contains if they exist in other solutions.

solutionUniqueName.description: The solution unique name to delete

post.description: Update the version number of an unmanaged solution.
Create a patch solution for an existing solution. Patches contain only changed components and are smaller than full solutions.

parentSolutionUniqueName.description: The parent solution unique name to patch

displayName.description: Display name for the patch solution

versionNumber.description: Optional version number for the patch (e.g., 1.0.1.0)

post.description: Clone an existing solution as a new independent solution. Used for branching or forking a solution.

parentSolutionUniqueName.description: The source solution unique name to clone

displayName.description: Display name for the new cloned solution

versionNumber.description: Optional version number for the clone (e.g., 2.0.0.0)

post.description: Delete the base solution and promote the holding solution to complete a staged upgrade. Use after importing with holdingSolution=true.

solutionUniqueName.description: The solution unique name to promote (the holding solution's base name)

get.description: List deployment pipelines configured in a pipeline host environment.
List deployment stages for a specific pipeline. Returns stage names, target environments, and order.

post.description: Trigger a deployment through a pipeline stage. Deploys the specified solution to the target environment of the selected stage.

solutionName.description: The solution unique name to deploy

get.description: Get the status of a deployment run.
List past deployment runs for a pipeline.
Internal operation for dynamic dropdowns. Returns environment IDs and names.
Internal operation for dynamic dropdowns. Returns solution names for a given environment.
Internal operation for dynamic dropdowns. Returns pipeline IDs and names for a given environment.
